title: dorychnium
intro: Dorychnium is a plant genus that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae), native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Dorychnium include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and wounds due to its antiseptic properties. Dorychnium can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, although caution is advised due to its potential toxicity in large doses.
